message:
bd-3oaig.18: add E2E test suite for mega showcase screen

31 tests covering the full MermaidMegaShowcaseScreen lifecycle:
- Smoke tests: initial rendering at multiple sizes, zero-area no-panic
- Sample navigation: forward/backward cycling with j/k/arrows
- Layout/direction/tier/glyph/wrap mode cycling
- Panel toggles (metrics, controls, detail, status, diagnostics, help)
- Zoom controls (+/-/0/f), auto-scale toggle, fit-to-view
- Perf sweep lifecycle (start/tick/complete/stop)
- Comparison mode toggle and layout cycling
- Search mode enter/type/accept/exit
- Generator controls (node count, seed)
- Pan and viewport override controls
- Style/palette cycling
- Determinism: identical screens produce identical frame hashes
- JSONL telemetry schema validation (required/nullable fields, dedup)
- Stress test: rapid key sequences without panics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
